name: FirstCash Holdings, Inc.
business: FirstCash Holdings, Inc. operates retail pawn stores in the U.S., Latin America, and the U.K., providing non-recourse pawn loans collateralized by personal property, and also sells pre-owned consumer products. Through its subsidiary American First Finance (AFF), the company offers retail point-of-sale payment solutions, including lease-to-own and installment financing, to credit-constrained consumers at merchant partners.
sellsTo: Under-banked and credit-constrained consumers in the United States
Under-banked and credit-constrained consumers in Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, El Salvador, Colombia)
Under-banked and credit-constrained consumers in the United Kingdom
Retail merchant partners in the U.S. (for POS payment solutions)

exposures.sentence: The Company also operates a retail POS payment solutions business.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of H&T Group, the leading pawn operator in the United Kingdom
catalysts.sentence: The Company completed the acquisition of H&T, the leading pawn operator in the United Kingdom with 286 store locations, on August 14, 2025.

catalysts.event: Authorization of $150 million common stock repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, the Board authorized an additional common stock repurchase program for up to $150.0 million of the Company’s outstanding common stock, of which the entire $150.0 million is currently remaining.

catalysts.event: Declaration of $0.42 per share first quarter cash dividend for 2026
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Board declared a $0.42 per share first quarter cash dividend on common shares outstanding, or an aggregate of $18.5 million based on the December 31, 2025 share count, to be paid on February 27, 2026 to stockholders of record as of February 18, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 25% of U.S. households remain unbanked or under-banked.
tamClaims.sentence: As examples, approximately 25% of U.S. households remain unbanked or under-banked while in Latin America, the number of unbanked or under-banked consumers can be as much as 75% of the local population.

tamClaims.claim: In Latin America, the number of unbanked or under-banked consumers can be as much as 75% of the local population.
tamClaims.sentence: As examples, approximately 25% of U.S. households remain unbanked or under-banked while in Latin America, the number of unbanked or under-banked consumers can be as much as 75% of the local population.
